about: Im a passionate Software Engineer specializing in front-end development with experience across the full software stack. I thrive in both collaborative, cross-functional teams as well as independent settings, with a strong grasp of the development lifecycle and agile methodologies. My priority is delivering quality, user-focused solutions and fresh, innovative experiences. I'm always eager to expand my skills and learn new technologies.

experience.title: Software Engineer
items: UI engineer for mPulse's portals division. I built and maintained responsive web and mobile UIs personalized for dozens of the largest healthcare clients in the US. Worked on project teams to develop new applications and features.

experience.title: Software Developer
items: Front-end lead on a project for a national telecom company developing a high profile medical web application. Worked onsite at client's headquarters as primary liaison for front-end implementation.
DevOps lead launching a new eCommerce website. Set up and maintained a CD pipeline using GitHub and AWS. Researched and integrated headless eCommerce platforms.

experience.title: Data Wrangler & AR Developer
items: Worked in the Real-time Interactive group at renowned commercial & game content studio Psyop's LA division.

Data wrangler for mocap data on a AAA video game project. Attended mocap shoots and processed all data for use in animation, client review, and Unreal development. Solo developer on various AR proof-of-concepts using a variety of technologies including Unity, 8th Wall, and ARKit.

personal.name: TETRA
personal.description: Audio visualizer dynamically animated purely with CSS. A proof of concept for doing nontrival math using only CSS.

personal.name: time.claps
personal.description: Web app used to display a synchronized countdown. Created to help coordinate certain activities with friends remotely, such as playing videos or syncing local audio recordings.

personal.name: ADALIN
personal.description: Discord bot integrated with a Dialogflow agent and a wiki. Can answer freeform questions about the contents of the wiki through text or speech recognition.

personal.name: ocean
personal.description: First-person audio visualizer made in Unity. Made with easily configurable settings to change the visuals to fit any song.

education.minors: Minored in Game Design & Development, Woman & Gender Studies
